title: 25x 3.5 x 30mm Chipboard Pan Head Wood Screws A2 Stainless Steel Chipboard Screws for Floorboards Wood Fences DIY Furniture & Repairs - Corrosion-Resistant and Durable
features: A2 stainless steel construction for corrosion resistance.
Pan head design provides secure grip and even load distribution.
Available in various sizes (3mm to 6mm) for multiple uses.
Ideal for securing chipboard, floorboards, and fences.
Suitable for both indoor and outdoor applications.
description: Product Description Chipboard Screws Our Chipboard Screws are available in A2-304 Stainless Steel, with both pan head and countersunk head being available
